user.title: Add Koubachi Plant Sensor
user.description: Enter the details for your Koubachi plant sensor. The MAC address and encryption key can be found in the Koubachi app or sensor documentation.

data.name: Device name
data.mac: MAC address (12 hex chars, no colons)

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Koubachi Plant Sensor
reconfigure.description: Update the name or calibration parameters for device `{mac}`. The MAC address and encryption key cannot be changed.

error.invalid_mac: MAC address must be 12 lowercase hex characters (e.g. aabbccddeeff)
error.invalid_key: Encryption key must be 32 hex characters
error.invalid_calibration: Calibration must be a valid JSON object
